known_ranges.label: legacy CSE combat-style row citations
known_ranges.reason: App-facing CSE combat-style rows now have bounded PDF-text row extraction, rendered page hashes, and independent rendered-page OCR title verification artifacts.

notes: App-facing CSE combat style rows have rendered page hashes, bounded PDF-text row extraction artifacts, and independent rendered-page OCR title verification artifacts. Source PDFs and page images remain ignored local artifacts.
